zh-CN.name: 降落伞
zh-CN.intro: 降落伞是一个大大的圆圆的伞，从飞机上跳下来的时候打开，可以慢慢落下来，很安全。它像一朵大花在空中开放。

story.title: 🪂小蓝伞的冒险
story.body: 天气真好，小蓝伞和好朋友小熊一起坐飞机。飞机飞得好高好高，白云就在窗外飘过。小蓝伞有点紧张，但它想到要保护小熊，就变得勇敢了。到了高高的天空，小熊说：‘我们跳下去！’小蓝伞紧紧抱住小熊，‘呼啦’一下，打开了大大的伞衣。它们像一片羽毛，慢慢飘呀飘。风儿轻轻吹，小蓝伞带着小熊看云朵、看小鸟。‘哇，好漂亮！’小熊开心地笑。小蓝伞稳稳地落在一片绿草地上，小熊说：‘谢谢你，小蓝伞，你真的好厉害！’小蓝伞收起伞衣，害羞地说：‘下次我们再一起飞！’

knowledge.title: 降落伞有什么用？
knowledge.body: 降落伞可以在危险的时候救人的命。当飞机出问题的时候，人们可以背着降落伞跳下来，它会像一把大伞一样打开，让人慢慢落地，不会受伤。降落伞也用在运动里，人们从高空跳下，享受飞翔的感觉。简单说，降落伞是空中的安全伙伴。

en.name: Parachute
en.intro: A parachute is a big, round tool that helps people float down slowly from the sky. It opens like a large flower when you jump from a plane, keeping you safe.

story.title: 🪂Little Blue Parachute's Adventure
story.body: One beautiful day, Little Blue Parachute went on a plane ride with his friend Bear. The plane flew so high, and white clouds drifted past the window. Little Blue was a bit nervous, but he thought about protecting Bear and became brave. When they reached the high sky, Bear shouted, "Let's jump!" Little Blue hugged Bear tightly, and with a whoosh, he opened his big canopy. They floated down gently, like a feather. The wind blew softly as Little Blue carried Bear past clouds and little birds. "Wow, so pretty!" Bear laughed happily. Little Blue landed softly on a green meadow. Bear said, "Thank you, Little Blue, you're amazing!" Little Blue folded his canopy and said shyly, "Let's fly together again next time!"

knowledge.title: Why do we need a parachute?
knowledge.body: A parachute can save lives in an emergency. If something goes wrong with a plane, people can jump with a parachute. It opens like a big umbrella and helps them land softly without getting hurt. Parachutes are also used in sports, where people jump from high places and enjoy the feeling of flying. In short, a parachute is a safety partner in the sky.
